class.name: SQLiteQuery
class.brief_description: Class for executing SQL queries on an SQLite database.
class.description: A class that allows you to execute SQL queries on an SQLite database. It provides methods for both single and batch execution of queries. It also provides a method to retrieve the column names from the last executed query and a method to get the last error message, if any.

method.name: batch_execute
method.description: Executes a batch of SQL queries. The queries are provided as an array of strings. Returns the result of the last query in the batch.

method.name: execute
method.description: Executes a single SQL query. The query is provided as a string. If the query requires arguments, they can be provided as an array. Returns the result of the query.

method.name: finalize_query
method.description: Finalizes and cleans up the prepared query statement.

method.name: get_columns
method.description: Returns an array of column names from the last executed query.

method.name: get_last_error_message
method.description: Returns the last error message, if any. If there was no error, returns an empty string.

method.name: is_ready
method.description: Returns true if the statement is prepared.
